verses.text: Gam tampi a uk Sisar Tiberius in a ukzawh a kum sawmlengana, Pontias Pilat in Judea gam ukin, Herod in Galilee gam ukin, a nau Filip in Iturea gam leh Trakhonitis gam ukin, Lysanias in Abilene gam uk a
Annas leh Kaiafas in siampi lianpen a sep laitakin sehnel gamah a om, Zekhariah' tapa Johan' tungah, Pasian' thu hong tung hi

Tua ahih ciangin Jordan Gun kiim gam khempeuhah Johan pai kawikawi a, kamsang Isaiah in Lai Siangtho sungah a gelh mah bangin, “Na mawhna panun kisik un la tui kiphum un. Tua hi leh Pasian in na mawhnate uh hong maisak ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi
Isaiah in hih bangin na gelh hi: “Gamsungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topa' paina ding lampi bawl un la, a tot ding lampi tangsak un
Kuam thuk khempeuh kivukdim ding a, mual lian mual neu khempeuh kitotam ding hi. Lam kawite kitangsak ding a, a leihumte kinelsak ding hi
Mi khempeuh in Pasian' hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi,’” ci-in a kigelh hi
Ama tuiphum ding utin a hong pai mi tampite kiangah Johan in, “Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw, hong tungding Pasian' hehna panin na suahtak theihna ding uh kua in hong gen ahi hiam

Na kisikna uh a kilatna dingin gamta un. Note khatlekhat in, ‘Abraham' suante ihi ngawn hi,’ mawkcih kei un. Ke'n kong cihin-ah, Pasian in hih suangte nangawn Abraham' suanlekhakte-in bawl thei lel hi
Tu mahmahin sing a bulphuk dingin hei tawh kingimzo hi. Gah hoih a gahlo singkung khempeuh kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin mihonpite in, “Tua bang ahih leh bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Johan in, “Puanak nih a nei mipa in a neilote hawm un la, annek ding a neite in a neilote hawm un,” ci-in a dawng hi
Siahdongte pawlkhat zong tui a kiphum dingin hong pai-in Johan kiangah, “Sia aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Amah in, “Na don' dingun a kilawm zahval na dong kei un,” ci-in a dawng hi

Galkap pawlkhatte in zong ama kiangah, “Kote, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin, “Zawhthawh thu tawh ahi a, a manlopi-in mawhsakna tawh ahi zongin kuama sum sut kei un la, na khasum ngahzah uh tawh lungkim un,” ci-in a dawng hi
Thulian khat peuhpeuh hong piang ding hi, ci-in mite' lawpna hong khang semsem a, hihpa pen Khrih hi khading hi, ci-in mite in a lungsim uhah a ngaihsun uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Johan in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in tui sungah note ka hong phum hi; ahi zongin kei sangin nakpi takin a lianzaw khat hong pailai ding hi. Ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin kei ka kilawmzo nai kei hi. Amah in Kha Siangtho leh mei sungah note hong phum ding hi
A buh cilsate a zapsiangna dingin amah in a khutsungah lawhpi tawi a, a takteng ansal sungah koihin, a siteng a mit ngeilo mei sungah a khul ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua bangin a lam tuamtuamin Johan in mite hanthawnin Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi
Ahi zongin, gam ukpa Herod in ama naupa' zi Herodias a ten'pihna hang leh a gamtat hoihlohna a tuamtuamte' hangin Johan in Herod a taii hi
Tua ciangin Herod in thong sungah Johan khia a, a gamtatsiatna a behlap lailai hi.
Mi khempeuh a kituiphum khit uh ciangin Jesuh zong a kituiphum hi. Jesuh in thu a nget laitakin vantung kihong a
vakhu pumpi lim nei-in Kha Siangtho ama tungah hong kumsuk hi. Tua laitakin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Nang pen ka it ka Tapa na hi a, nangma tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a ci hi.
Nasep a kipat ciangin Jesuh ama khan' kum sawmthum bang a pha hi. Mite in ama pa Josef hi, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi. Josef' pa Heli
Heli' pa Matthat, Matthat' pa Levi, Levi' pa Melkhi, Melkhi' pa Jannai, Jannai' pa Josef
Josef' pa Mattathias, Mattathias' pa Amos, Amos' pa Nahum, Nahum' pa Esli, Esli' pa Naggai
Naggai' pa Maath, Maath' pa Mattathias, Mattathias' pa Semein, Semein' pa Josek, Josek' pa Joda
Joda' pa Joanan, Joanan' pa Resa, Resa' pa Zerubbabel, Zerubbabel' pa Shealtiel, Shealtiel' pa Neri
Neri' pa Melkhi, Melkhi' pa Addi, Addi' pa Kosam, Kosam' pa Elmadam, Elmadam' pa Er
Er' pa Joshua, Joshua' pa Eliezer, Eliezer' pa Jorim, Jorim' pa Matthat, Matthat' pa Levi
Levi' pa Simeon, Simeon' pa Judah, Judah' pa Josef, Josef' pa Jonam, Jonam' pa Eliakim
Eliakim' pa Melea, Melea' pa Menna, Menna' pa Mattatha, Mattatha' pa Nathan, Nathan' pa David
David' pa Jessi, Jessi' pa Obed, Obed' pa Boaz, Boaz' pa Salmon, Salmon' pa Nahshon
Nahshon' pa Amminadab, Amminadab' pa Admin, Admin' pa Hezron, Hezron' pa Perez, Perez' pa Judah
Judah' pa Jakob, Jakob' pa Isaac, Isaac' pa Abraham, Abraham' pa Terah, Terah' pa Nahor
Nahor' pa Serug, Serug' pa Reu, Reu' pa Peleg, Peleg' pa Eber, Eber' pa Shelah
Shelah' pa Kainan, Kainan' pa Arpakshad, Arpakshad' pa Shem, Shem' pa Noah, Noah' pa Lamek
Lamek' pa Methuselah, Methuselah' pa Enok, Enok' pa Jared, Jared' pa Mahalaleel, Mahalaleel' pa Kainan
Kainan' pa Enos, Enos' pa Seth, Seth' pa Adam, Adam' pa Pasian ahi hi.
